notes: M3 depth: a health & illness system (chronic and acute conditions you can treat at the doctor), crime and prison (pull off seeded jobs for a payoff, or get caught and serve time), assets that build your net worth (cars, homes, luxuries), personality traits rolled at birth, achievements to unlock, richer relationship interactions, and 200+ life events (up from ~106). Your existing v0.11.0 save carries forward.
